title: 工具执行成功: read_file
content:

I think I need to handle a greeting since the user just said hello. The developer mentioned that I should manage the plan if a new task is proposed, but this seems more like a greeting than an actual task. It’s a bit odd to have a historical focus on the word "hello," but I want to be clear and concise in my response. I’ll keep it simple and friendly!"

I’ll break it down into steps so I can work systematically: start with understanding the existing parts, identify areas that need improvement, and check for any errors. By taking my time to plan, I can ensure I’ll get it right and make the necessary adjustments. Let's dive in!",
